name: Summit Midstream Corp
business: Summit Midstream Corporation develops, owns, and operates midstream energy infrastructure assets, including gathering, compression, treating, processing, and transmission services for natural gas, crude oil, and produced water. The company primarily serves producers in unconventional resource basins, such as shale formations, across the continental United States. Its revenue is largely derived from long-term, fee-based contracts with customers in the oil and gas industry.
sellsTo: producers of natural gas and crude oil
utilities and end-users via downstream pipelines

exposures.sentence: Summit Midstream Corporation... is a value-driven company focused on developing, owning and operating midstream energy infrastructure assets that are strategically located in the core producing areas of unconventional resource basins, primarily shale formations, in the continental United States.

catalysts.sentence: On March 10, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Moonrise Midstream, LLC (the Moonrise Acquisition) from Fundare Resources Company, LLC for approximately $90.0 million...

catalysts.event: Resumption of Series A Preferred Stock dividend
catalysts.sentence: On February 28, 2025, we announced that our Board of Directors approved the resumption of a quarterly cash dividend on our Series A Preferred Stock.

catalysts.event: Payment of accrued Series A Preferred Stock dividends expected by March 31, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to pay the accrued and unpaid dividends on the Series A Preferred Stock upon satisfaction of certain notice requirements, which the Company expects to complete by March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Execution of 10-year extension of gathering agreement with key customer in Williston Basin
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, we executed several new commercial agreements with both existing and new customers, including a 10-year extension of a gathering agreement with a key customer in the Williston Basin and a new 15-year agreement with a key customer in the Williston Basin.

catalysts.event: Double E precedent agreement for 100 MMcf/d of firm capacity with expected in-service 4Q2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, Double E executed a new precedent agreement with Producers Midstream for 100 MMcf/d of firm capacity on the Double E Pipeline with an expected in-service date during the fourth quarter of 2026 and a 10-year term.

catalysts.event: Double E agreement for 210 MMcf/d of firm capacity, first tranche flowing 4Q2026
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2025, Double E (i) executed an agreement which includes 210 MMcf/d of firm capacity, with the first tranche of volume set to begin flowing in the fourth quarter of 2026, and an 11-year term

catalysts.event: Double E agreement for 230 MMcf/d of firm capacity, first tranche flowing 4Q2027
catalysts.sentence: and (ii) executed an agreement which includes 230 MMcf/d of firm capacity, with the first tranche of volume set to begin flowing in the fourth quarter of 2027, and over an 11-year term.

catalysts.event: Completion of $440.0 million New Permian Transmission Facility refinancing
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we completed a $440.0 million refinancing of our Permian Transmission Credit Facilities in the form of the New Permian Transmission Facility with a maturity in March 2031.
